However, they face challenges like an untimely death, a kidnapping plot, another corpse, burglars, and a visit from the boys in blue.

programme.title: Bedazzled
programme.desc: A young man desperate to change his life makes a deal with the Devil.

programme.title: Wild Oats
programme.desc: After the death of her husband, Eva, a retired school teacher, accidentally receives an insurance of USD 50,00,000. She and her friend Maddie decide to enjoy life with the acquired money.

programme.title: Not Another Happy Ending
programme.desc: When struggling publisher Tom Duval discovers his only successful author, Jane Lockhart, has writer's block, he knows he has to fix the problem.

programme.title: Children Ruin Everything
programme.desc: James and Astrid try to have a nice family dinner to celebrate a special occasion, but their young children make it challenging.

programme.title: Children Ruin Everything
programme.desc: Pressured to not look “like a dad” for an upcoming work event, James takes his kids out on a shopping trip. Seán Cullen guest stars.

programme.title: From Janitor To Company CEO
programme.desc: Ricky, a high school dropout and former drug dealer, faces his father's constant disapproval. Given a second chance at a janitorial job, he creates a revolutionary chip flavor, rising to COO and finally earning his father's pride.

programme.title: Student Becomes Millionaire Magician
programme.desc: Sean, a Filipino immigrant, faces bullying and family pressure to abandon his dreams of magic for a stable career. Despite setbacks, his passion for magic endures, eventually bringing him fame and allowing him to give back to his family.

programme.title: Billionaire Parents With Goth Daughter
programme.desc: Spoiled Ava's parents try to control her life, hiring a con artist, Keltie, to break up Ava's relationship with her "unsuitable" boyfriend, Danny. But Keltie's conscience, Ava's talent, and Danny's integrity reveal the parents' misguided attempts at love.

programme.title: Girl Can't Say No To Friends
programme.desc: Phil Knight, a struggling runner, dreams of revolutionizing athletic shoes. Partnering with his former coach, Bill Bowerman, they face setbacks, betrayal, and financial woes, but their unwavering determination and innovative spirit ultimately lead to the birth of Nike.

programme.title: Stepmom Takes Inheritance
programme.desc: After a plane crash paralyzes Jack and kills his dad, his stepmom abandons him. A kind doctor becomes his foster mom, helping him walk again. Jack then chooses to become a doctor, ultimately forgiving and helping his estranged stepmom.

programme.title: Streamer Is Caught Cheating
programme.desc: Mikey scams viewers by having his brother, Jayden, play Minecraft on his stream, taking all the credit and money. His deception unravels at a fan event when he can't play himself, exposing his fraud. Jayden then gains recognition, leaving Mikey to face the consequences.

programme.title: Employee Fakes Sick To Skip Work
programme.desc: Jacob, a compulsive liar, fakes his grandma's death to skip work for a date with his boss's daughter, Nicole. His web of lies unravels when both grandmas appear, exposing his deceit and costing him his job, his girlfriend, and his dignity.

programme.title: Caught Cheating On Drivers Test
programme.desc: Tim, a spoiled teen, cheats on his driving test using his dad's Tesla, but his schemes unravel. After hitting a car and failing, he's arrested, and his furious dad refuses bail, leaving Tim to face the consequences alone.

programme.title: Girl Bullied for Being Wrestler
programme.desc: Riley secretly wrestles while her mother pushes for a traditional life. After her boyfriend issues an ultimatum, she chooses her dream, earns her mother's support, and begins training with a pro.

programme.title: Teacher Gets Revenge on School Bully
programme.desc: After his teacher helps him transform from a scrawny victim to a confident student, Miles realizes his bully, Grant, is hiding a painful home life. Miles records evidence of Grant's abusive stepfather, helping Grant find safety and redemption.

programme.title: Scrawny Teen Takes Pills to Beat Bully
programme.desc: Scrawny Ethan is pressured to take steroids by a corrupt coach. Choosing hard work over shortcuts, he trains with the school janitor to beat his bully in a showdown and expose the coach's crimes.

programme.title: Toxic Friends Don't Know Friend Is Secretly Famous
programme.desc: After being bullied for his weight and mocked for his dream of stand-up, lawyer Jonah quits his job. Guided by comedian Lauren, he finds success and proves his toxic friends and ex-girlfriend wrong.

programme.title: Girl Is Dumped Then Becomes a Millionaire
programme.desc: After her fiancé Alex fires her and leaves her for her best friend, Hannah seeks revenge by teaming up with his estranged brother, Logan. She finds true success and love where she least expected it.

programme.title: 8 Out Of 10 Cats
programme.desc: 8 Out of 10 Cats is a weekly, panel show based around a series of opinion poll surveys carried out in Britain.

programme.title: 8 Out Of 10 Cats

programme.title: Wolfblood S02 E11
programme.desc: The day before school Parents' Evening, Maddy, Tom, Shannon and Rhydian are helping Jana clean her caravan. Rhydian's Mother, Ceri, shows up. But it's not just Rhydian she has come to see. She tells Jana that her Father Alric has been deposed by the pack, making Jana the new Alpha. If Jana doesn't assume her destiny as heir, the pack will destroy itself as betas fight for control.

programme.title: Wolfblood S02 E12
programme.desc: Liam returns to school after his ep 10 trauma. Maddy and Rhydian aren't in registration. It's the day of the full moon and Tom surmises they are out having fun. But what they are actually doing is fleeing for their lives from Alric who is out for revenge. Maddy tricks Alric into using Eolas under the electric power lines and they escape. In school, oral exams are taking place in the hall.

programme.title: Wolfblood S02 E13
programme.desc: Daniel has knocked the wall through, determined to investigate these amazing tunnels which lead directly into the den. Emma is convinced their time at the house is over. Their secret is out. But Maddy and Rhydian try to persuade her that Liam may not know what he's seen or where he was. They will go into school, having phoned Tom and Shannon to find out what they can.

programme.title: H2O
programme.sub-title: Just add Water, Season 1 S01 E01 Metamorphosis
programme.desc: Cleo and Emma meet new girl, Rikki, and find themselves stuck on Mako Island where they are transformed into mermaids. As well as growing tails, the girls find they have powers over water.

programme.title: H2O
programme.sub-title: Just add Water, Season 1 S01 E02 Pool Party
programme.desc: Annoying Miss Popularity, Miriam, is having a pool party that the girls don't want to miss. But it's a risky activity for three mermaids: their secret could be out. Spurned by Lewis, Rikki discovers her mermaid power is to boil water at will!

programme.title: H2O
programme.sub-title: Just add Water, Season 1 S01 E03 Catch of the Day
programme.desc: When Emma and Rikki save a sea turtle from a fishing trawler's net, they are mistaken for sharks. A shark hunt ensues. Cleo, getting over her fear of water, saves another turtle, but she is trapped.

programme.title: H2O
programme.sub-title: Just add Water, Season 1 S01 E04 Party Girls
programme.desc: Determined to live her life as normal, Cleo confronts her fears and lands a job at the Marine Park, helping out to feed the dolphins. Despite her precautions, she gets splashed and, just as she's about to turn into a mermaid, a mysterious Old Woman, Miss Chatham, comes to her rescue.

programme.title: H2O
programme.sub-title: Just add Water, Season 1 S01 E05 Something Fishy
programme.desc: Kim reads Cleo's diary and finds evidence of mermaidness. She spies on the girls and decides Miriam is the head mermaid. Miriam and Cleo enter the Queen of the Sea contest where Kim tries to prove her theory but only succeeds in upsetting Miriam.

programme.title: H2O
programme.sub-title: Just add Water, Season 1 S01 E06 Young Love
programme.desc: Rikki gains an admirer in Emma's younger brother Elliot when she saves him from drowning. She lets him down hard causing him to run away and hide in the fernery. The girls find him just as the watering system is about to start.

programme.title: H2O
programme.sub-title: Just add Water, Season 1 S01 E07 Moon Spell
programme.desc: The effects of the full moon turns Emma into a carefree, wild mermaid. At her father's birthday party she's the opposite to her usual, organised self. Can the other girls stop her before all is revealed?

programme.title: H2O
programme.sub-title: Just add Water, Season 1 S01 E08 The Denman Affair
programme.desc: A charismatic newcomer, Dr Denman, tempts Lewis with the promise of scientific fame and fortune. Will he abandon his friends and risk their secret, all in the name of science?

programme.title: H2O
programme.sub-title: Just add Water, Season 1 S01 E09 Dangerous Waters
programme.desc: Rikki uses her abilities as a mermaid to earn some quick cash but when she accidentally becomes involved in a fish smuggling operation she sets out to get her revenge.

programme.title: H2O
programme.sub-title: Just add Water, Season 1 S01 E10 The Camera Never Lies
programme.desc: Zane tries to impress his dad by entering in the local film competition, filming his attempt to break his Dad's windsurfing record around Mako Island. He gets into trouble with sharks and unbeknownst to him, is saved by mermaid Rikki.

programme.title: The Unsellables

programme.title: The Unsellables

programme.title: Kim & Matt
programme.desc: Kim's been pouring her heart out to Matt for over 10 years. Now, Kim's facing a life-changing decision - should she marry her current boyfriend or find out if Matt is her soul mate?

programme.title: Jasmine & Mike
programme.desc: Jasmine has been texting with Mike for two years and thinks he could be the perfect step-father for her son. Although they live only 15 minutes apart, the pair have yet to meet up in person.

programme.title: Jarrod & Abby
programme.desc: How do young people who've embraced the digital age find love? Often by connecting online with others they've never met in person before. The problem -- that cute guy you may be falling in love with could be lying about who he really is.

programme.title: Kya & Alyx
programme.desc: In this episode we meet Kya and Alyx, who fell in love quickly after meeting online. Are they being honest with each other? Hosts Nev Schulman and Max Joseph investigate.

programme.title: Joe & Kari Ann
programme.desc: Joe was sceptical when Miss Teen USA, Kari, sent him a friend request. Now, after months of communication, Joe thinks it might be the real deal, and he might have found love with her.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: We sit down with Master Shi Heng Yi of the Shaolin Temple Europe to uncover the reality of the warrior's path. Discussing the internal power of Chan Buddhism, he reveals how ancient virtues can serve as cures for modern anxiety and stress.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: We sat down with Hollywood legend Jeff Goldblum to discuss his life and career. Jeff tells us all about how he got into acting, his favourite roles, and the actors he most wants to work with.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: In this episode of Minutes With, we sit down with human rights lawyer Clive Stafford Smith, who has represented over 400 people on death row in the United States. Clive shares his unique insights into the realities of defending detainees at Guantánamo Bay, explores the possibility of the U.S. abolishing the death penalty, and exposes the “barbaric” execution methods still in use.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: In this episode of Minutes With, we sit down with Max Brandrett, who has spent most of his life forging paintings. Max tells us about his childhood, what his favourite forgery is and how he used to make them.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Chris Fuller, a former British Army Bomb Disposal Officer, who now does humanitarian work in the Middle East, talks to us about defusing bombs in the centre of London, and the difference between working in the UK and abroad.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: In this week's episode of Minutes With, we sat down with American veteran Chris VanSant as he takes us through his remarkable career in the Delta Force. Chris reveals the rigorous selection process required to join the elite force and takes us inside combat situations, explaining the complex operations that led to the capture of Saddam Hussein and the 'deck of cards' during the invasion of Iraq. Chris explains how death, loss and guilt caught up with him after years of service, leading to a moment that changed his life forever and set him on a new path.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Linda Calvey, also known as Black Widow, is one of the most famous female gangsters in the UK. In this episode, Linda tells us about her life story, crime path and what she thinks of people calling her a Black Widow.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: In this episode we hear from Pam Fraser, a nudist, who tells us all about the advantages of living a naked life.

programme.title: Snack Wars

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: Daniel Radcliffe Tries British & American Food | Snack Wars | Mumford & Sons Try Iconic UK & US Snacks | Snack Wars

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: England rugby stars Owen Farrell, Maro Itoje and Jamie George take on Snack Wars, tasting British classics against global flavours. From Tottenham cake to jellied eels, expect banter, honest reactions and a wild food showdown.

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: Korean band TOMORROW X TOGETHER compares British and Korean food in this episode of Snack Wars! Soobin and Beomgyu make a mess opening Turtle Chips, Yeonjun loves British noodles, Kai rates Irn Bru, and Taehyun adores Monster Munch! Henry Golding joins us for the ultimate British vs Malaysian snacks battle. He tries iconic treats from both countries, shares why durian fruit is banned in parts of Asia, and raves about his favourite Malaysian Mamee noodles. Jackie Chan is trading martial arts for mouthfuls in the ultimate taste test: Snack Wars. The legendary action star joins LADbible to put British and Chinese snacks head-to-head in a hilarious, high-stakes food showdown.

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: Get ready for the ultimate snack showdown as Hollywood stars Margot Robbie and Colin Farrell go head-to-head taste-testing their nations' most iconic treats, and things get competitive... Fast.

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: Timothée Chalamet and Austin Butler pit US and UK foods against each other to see who takes the ultimate title of reigning snack champion. Millie Bobby Brown tackles meals from the UK and the US, including carrot cake, liquorice allsorts and energy drinks. The Stranger Things star compares Bovril to a Starbucks vanilla latte, and faces her biggest food gripe: quinoa.

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: Leo Woodall takes on the ultimate UK versus USA food challenge, revealing his love of Beavertown beer, debating the greatness of a Greggs sausage roll and pits Flamin Hot Cheetos against British lunch box classic Skips.

programme.title: Snack Wars

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: Channing Tatum and Naomi Ackie join us for a great game of Snack Wars: USA v UK! Channing devours some Popeyes, Naomi introduces Channing to classic British booze WKD, and they try each other's favourite childhood candy!

programme.title: Jodha Akbar
programme.desc: Jodha Akbar is a period drama set in the sixteenth century, focusing on the political marriage between Mughal Emperor Akbar and Rajput Princess Jodha Bai. Initially a marriage of convenience, it evolves into a deep love story that changes the fate of India. The series portrays the era's wars, the complex relationships between the Mughals and Rajputs, and the political dynamics of the royal court. Akbar, raised as a ruthless conqueror, learns the meaning of love and compassion through Jodha, who despises the Mughals for their invasions. Their relationship transforms Akbar from a heartless ruler into the beloved Emperor Akbar, known for his justice and wisdom.

programme.title: Money Flower Ep.16
programme.desc: With the opposition party winning the presidential election, Cheong-A Group faces a major crisis. Sung-man is on the verge of being arrested by prosecutors. Meanwhile, Mo-hyun realizes that Pil-joo had been present during her first encounter with Bu-cheon, and in his empty room, she discovers an old photo of herself from middle school...

programme.title: Money Flower Ep.17
programme.desc: Bu-cheon raises a knife at Seo-won, who threatens to hold a press conference. Mo-hyun loses Pil-joo's necklace to Mal-ran. Meanwhile, Bu-cheon confides in Oh the driver, revealing that his half-brother Jang Eun-chun is alive — and that he is none other than Kang Pil-joo.

programme.title: Rebirth Ep.18
programme.desc: After Kang-joo uncovers that Tae-jun led the corruption probe 20 years ago, he moves to stop her investigation. As Detective Kyung regains consciousness, Ha-eun secretly arranges protection for him. Meanwhile, Tae-jun and Sang-guk become increasingly drawn into Hee-soo's scheme. Jin-woo confesses his feelings, but Eun-ha makes it clear she cannot move on from Ha-eun.

programme.title: Rebirth Ep.19
programme.desc: Episode 19As Detective Kyung slowly recovers, he searches for Ha-eun, who continues to hide his identity. Tae-jun and In-cheol track down clues about Min Soo-yeon, while Dong-chan is threatened over a past case. Meanwhile, Kang-joo faces pressure over her investigation, and Ha-eun secretly moves Kyung to safety—where Kyung takes his hand and calls him “Kang-hyuk.”

programme.title: Rebirth Ep.20
programme.desc: After learning that Detective Kyung has disappeared, Tae-jun and Sang-guk pressure Dong-chan, fearing the truth may be exposed. While searching for Kyung, Dong-chan is suddenly attacked by Park Sang-chul and hospitalized. Meanwhile, Jin-woo uncovers signs of stock manipulation involving the Star Hotel and begins suspecting deeper corruption tied to J&C. As business conflicts intensify and alliances crack, Eun-ha remains firm in rejecting Jin-woo, while a bracelet resurfaces—bringing her one step closer to the truth about Ha-eun.

programme.title: Rebirth Ep.21
programme.desc: Detective Kyung confirms Ha-eun's true identity, while Eun-ha also begins to realize the truth after recognizing a meaningful bracelet. As secrets unravel, Dong-chan blackmails Tae-jun and Sang-guk with evidence of past corruption, and new threats emerge from Park Sang-chul. Unable to suppress his emotions any longer, Ha-eun finally confronts Eun-ha, setting the stage for a turning point.

programme.title: Rebirth Ep.22
programme.desc: Shocked after discovering Ha-eun's hideout, Eun-ha begs him to forget everything and return to the past, but he asks her to trust and wait. As Sang-guk and Tae-jun grow fearful of a hidden third party, Dong-chan escalates his threats, while financial pressure mounts on Jin-woo. Meanwhile, Detective Kyung prepares to return and gathers key testimony, as long-buried truths about Ha-eun's identity and In-cheol's secrets begin to surface.

programme.title: Rebirth Ep.23
programme.desc: After learning of In-cheol's role, Ha-eun is shaken but finds brief comfort with Eun-ha. As Hee-soo discovers that Min Soo-yeon is his mother, he hesitates to leave and seeks the truth about his past. Meanwhile, Mi-jung hands over evidence of Sang-guk's corruption, and Yang Man-cheol's wife delivers proof of Dong-chan's threats. As Kang-joo uncovers that Steven Lee is actually Hee-soo and confronts Tae-jun, the real Steven Lee suddenly appears—while Ha-eun finds a crucial letter left behind before Im Dae-sik's death, bringing him closer to the truth.

programme.title: Honour Ep.7
programme.desc: Even Lee Seon-hwa has been murdered. Ra-young strives to obtain other evidence to stop Je-yeol and the high-ranking officials who used the application. Meanwhile, as the whereabouts of Jun-hyeok's laptop—which contains evidence of sexual exploitation—become unknown, Park Je-yeol is pressured by Jung-hyun, one of the application's users.

programme.title: Honour Ep.8
programme.desc: Ra-young escapes after being trapped in Park Je-yeol's house. Having secured evidence regarding the application from Park Je-yeol's phone, Ra-young prepares for a counterattack. In response, Park Je-yeol attempts to corner Ra-young by exposing an attempted murder case committed by L&J 20 years ago.

programme.title: Honour Ep.9
programme.desc: Following Ra-young's confession, victims of the application gather at L&J, and public discourse regarding the sexual exploitation case begins. Feeling the crisis, Park Je-yeol attempts to flee but is caught by the application users. Ra-young pushes forward fiercely to properly expose the incident, but she staggers due to an unexpected counterattack.

programme.title: Honour Ep.10
programme.desc: Ra-young is detained in a holding center on charges of murdering Park Je-yeol. She falls into confusion after learning the truth about Min-seo's identity. Meanwhile, Shin-jae, who is struggling to get Ra-young out, discovers that there is someone behind Min-seo controlling her.

programme.title: Honour Ep.11
programme.desc: As Shin-jae decides to join forces with Baek Tae-ju, L&J begins the process of disbandment. When Shin-jae relentlessly brings down Hae-il, Ra-young questions Shin-jae's irrational behavior. She realizes that there is one person at the end of all the incidents, including the application.

programme.title: Honour Ep.12
programme.desc: Using the evidence obtained through Shin-jae's sacrifice, Ra-young delivers the final blow to Baek Tae-ju. After joining forces to bring down Baek Tae-ju, L&J continues the remaining battle against the application users. In a situation where a grueling fight is expected, Shin-jae declares that she cannot return to L&J.

programme.title: Longing for You Ep.1
programme.desc: Young-ju, who was investigating the murder case of National Assemblyman's son Bae Min-gyu's wife, faces difficulties in the investigation due to Min-gyu's alibi, and Young-woon instinctively senses it is a serial murder while searching the scene of another murder case with the same method. Meanwhile, an unbelievable incident occurs in Woojin, a peaceful village that has been crime-free for 50 years...

programme.title: Goddess of Fire Ep.16
programme.desc: As Jeongi explains the shape of a wine cup, Gwanghae finds his gaze drawn to her lips and abruptly excuses himself, flustered by his own reaction. Later, Gangcheon is stunned to discover Euldam's pottery at the merchant guild and asks Hwa-ryeong whether Jeongi is truly Euldam's daughter. Taedo quietly observes Jeongi and Gwanghae sitting side by side before the kiln. On the day of the Giroyeon banquet, Jeongi grows increasingly anxious when the vessels fail to arrive at the hall.

programme.title: Goddess of Fire Ep.17
programme.desc: Upon discovering that Jeongi is Euldam's daughter, Gangcheon expels her from the Bunwon workshop. In front of everyone, Mun Saseung kneels and begs Gangcheon to spare her. When Hwa-ryeong declares that she will live solely to defeat Jeongi, Taedo is left shaken. Soon after, Jeongi is ordered to craft a porcelain vase as a birthday gift for Royal Consort Inbin, and Gwanghae promises to support her with everything he has.

programme.title: Goddess of Fire Ep.18
programme.desc: Startled by the sound of vases shattering inside the kiln, Jeongi peers inside and suddenly collapses. Hearing that Jeongi had been guarding the kiln alone, Gwanghae turns pale and desperately searches for her. Taedo watches over the unconscious Jeongi with quiet anguish. Seeing Jeongi injured, her eyesight damaged, Gwanghae is overcome with pain—yet Jeongi asks only to be allowed back into the Bunwon.

programme.title: Goddess of Fire Ep.19
programme.desc: Claiming she has no lingering attachment, Jeongi leaves the Bunwon behind, and Gwanghae watches her go in hollow disbelief. After returning to her former home, Jeongi and Taedo are suddenly seized by military officers, who drag Taedo away. Gwanghae pleads with Inbin to release him, insisting that Taedo once served as his personal guard. Awakened by her mother Yeonok's voice, Jeongi rises and walks toward the kiln…

programme.title: Goddess of Fire Ep.20
programme.desc: King Seonjo orders Gwanghae, Imhae, and Shinseong to find a way to end the people's widespread stomach illness, prompting Gwanghae to disguise himself and investigate in secret. While surveying the village, he unexpectedly encounters Jeongi, who is making and distributing bowls to the villagers. Jeongi carefully presents a vessel she crafted especially for Gwanghae. Soon, a royal decree is issued for the Bunwon to produce pottery for the common people, and Gwanghae sets out to find Jeongi.

programme.title: Goddess of Fire Ep.21

programme.title: Return of the Bible Plagues
programme.desc: Return of the Bible Plagues - Locusts: “... locusts … invaded all Egypt …. They covered all the ground until it was black,” reports the Bible. “They devoured … everything growing in the fields … – nothing green remained on trees or palms in all the lands of Egypt.” (Exodus 10:14–15). Swarms of locusts are still a very real plague today.

programme.title: Return of the Bible Plagues
programme.desc: Return of the Bible Plagues - Sandstorm: “… darkness that can be felt … covered all Egypt for three days,” reports the Bible. “No one could see anyone else … for three days.” (Exodus 10:22–23). Dust storms frequently paralyze public life during the storm season in many of the most arid regions of the Earth, burying roads and human settlements, threatening the lives of humans and animals alike.

programme.title: Children of the Wild
programme.desc: In many cultures there are myths about “wolf children” who were taken from their families and then grew up in the wild, either alone or with wolves, bears or other animals. But how close are such stories to reality? This program offers a combination of two stories: the true story of the monkey boy John Ssebunya in Uganda, and that of Rudyard Kipling's Mowgli, the most famous, albeit fictitious, wolf child of all. Unlike the children in the myths and stories, children who grow up without human beings have massive problems integrating themselves into society. The program specifically follows the fate of the young Ugandan boy John Ssebunya. If there is no human being as communication partner in the first years of a child's life, the wolf child will yelp, growl, scream or grunt. He is not yet ready to make contact with other children.

programme.title: The Silicon Valley Revolution
programme.sub-title: How a few nerds did change the world
programme.desc: The Silicon Valley Revolution - How a few nerds did change the world - From Hippies to the first PC: Todays' Silicon Valley is the home for multi-million dollar IT companies. In the beginning, however, it was unsophisticated, colourful, chaotic, and revolutionary. Hippies and amateur entrepreneurs initiated an unprecedented revolution: the pioneers of the PC wanted to change the world in an attempt to dethrone the “Big Brother”.

programme.title: Camp Century
programme.desc: In 1959 the USA decided to build a military town under the ice sheet of North Greenland. The superpower wanted to use all its might to gain a strategic advantage over the Soviet Union.

programme.title: The Advance of the Hanseatic League
programme.desc: At the bottom of the Baltic Sea lies a cog, a relic of the might of the German Hanse, a league of merchantmen founded about 1200 AD. Archaeologists are retracing its final voyage using state of the art technology as well as ancient scripts. Their search takes them to the Norwegian port of Bergen, to the Shetlands and even as far as Iceland.

programme.title: Expedition in the South Seas
programme.desc: He is one of the greatest German explorers of all time even though his name fell into oblivion: As luck would have it, in 1772 17-year-old Georg Forster was given the chance to accompany the greatest navigator of his time, James Cook, on his world circumnavigation. On this voyage, Captain Cook discovered islands and peoples, while Georg Forster focused on animals and plants, discovering more than 400 species that had been unknown to Europeans until then. “Terra X” follows German actor Robert Atzorn on his search for traces around the world. He gets to know a young man, whose philosophy and conception of the world still appear to be really modern. Sophisticated dramatic reconstructions bring the fateful sea journey to life. The film portrays a great natural scientist whose knowledge and legacy determined patterns for scientific research in the 21st century.

programme.title: Pig vs. Pug
programme.desc: Cesar steps in to stop the chaos as a rowdy pug, a shepherd who likes to hide and two spicy dachshunds battle for control in their homes.

programme.title: Devil Dog
programme.desc: An aggressive Lab mix, a compulsive poodle and a bulldog fixated on skateboard wheels keep Cesar on his toes.

programme.title: Doggie Jekyll and Hyde
programme.desc: Cesar meets a fierce stray jindo, a grief-striken boxer and a Great Dane who's tearing the house apart. Can calm be restored?

programme.title: The Power of Plants The Great Escape
programme.desc: You think plants are boring or passive? Far from it! They use complex reactions to respond to light, sound and touch. And like in the animal kingdom, different species have developed a near unending list of strategies to ensure their legacy is passed on. Plants have evolved tricks to beat the ele-ments, animal enemies or even other plants: From thorns and spines to poisons and even live-in bodyguards. This two-part series shows the survival strategies of our green “roommates” we share the planet with.

programme.title: Hunters of the Forest
programme.desc: Forests are dark, shady habitats, realms of shadows perfect for predators to lurk. The dense plant growth facilitates a wealth of prey species, and cunning predators of all shapes and sizes have adapted to exploit every niche. Whether crawling on the forest floor, gliding through the trees or stalking the shadows in between, hunters have mastered the terrain in every type of forest imagina-ble. And they're not just stealthy, they're also some of the most enigmatic and beautiful creatures on the planet.

programme.title: Europe's Wilderness
programme.desc: This popular motif in prehistoric cave paintings, the European Bison is Europe's heaviest land mammal. Weighing in at just under one tonne, it is also Europe's last wild cattle spieces

programme.title: Europe's Wilderness
programme.desc: With antlers that can grow up to 2 meters in size and can consume 10kg of grass, young trees and bark a day the Elk is the largest deep spieces in the world. programme.title: World's Most Dangerous Railway Lines
programme.desc: The Pamban Railway crosses the tropical landscape of Tamil Nadu, the former Madras, for around 600 kilometers. Heavy storms and rain showers make the route a challenge for Indian Railways to this day. The film accompanies the "Rameswaram Express" over the notorious Pamban Bridge, the first bridge across the Indian Ocean.

programme.title: World's Most Dangerous Railway Lines
programme.desc: The Ferrocarril del Sur, one of the highest train routes on earth, runs right through the mountains of Peru. To this day, it is considered a miracle in the world of railways. The rails not only lead to the famous ruined city of Machu Picchu but connect the ancient Inca capital of Cusco with Puno on the shores of Lake Titicaca and the gleaming white city of Arequipa. A train journey with the Andes Explorer through a grandiose landscape and an undeveloped and inaccessible area.

programme.title: World's Most Dangerous Railway Lines
programme.desc: In northern Argentina, the world-famous Tren a las Nubes - the cloud train - crosses dizzying viaducts and deep valleys. At an altitude of over 4000 meters, what was once the highest railway runs past cactus forests and into the driest desert in the world. A technical feat in the Andes and a breathtaking ride through spectacular scenery.In northern Argentina, the world-famous Tren a las Nubes - the cloud train - crosses dizzying viaducts and deep valleys. At an altitude of over 4000 meters, what was once the highest railway runs past cactus forests and into the driest desert in the world. A technical feat in the Andes and a breathtaking ride through spectacular scenery.

programme.title: Women Above the Clouds
programme.desc: Alaska - the largest and at the same time most sparsely populated state in the USA. Only about 740,000 people live here. Often far away in small villages. Almost every village has its own airstrip. Aircrafts are one of the main means of transport in Alaska. Jamie Klaes is one of the many female pilots in the country.

programme.title: Women Above the Clouds
programme.desc: Aerobatics is the supreme discipline in air sports. Only a few pilots dare to navigate a machine during loops, drops and steep flights because nausea and blackouts due to the strong G-forces can be life-threatening. But flight instructor Jenny Holmenes is not deterred - she wants to prove her skills. Although she is still a beginner, she competes in the "Sportsman" class at the Norwegian Aerobatic Championships.

programme.title: Women Above the Clouds
programme.desc: Living conditions are harsh in the Australian outback, especially in William Creek. Only 17 people live here, and in summer even less - only two. There is a motel, a campsite, a pub and the only petrol station in a radius of hundreds of miles. The young bush pilot Hannah Jane Cash lives and works here.

programme.title: Women Above the Clouds
programme.desc: Alia Twal is an enthusiastic pilot, globetrotter and adventurer. She is a first officer with the Jordanian airline Royal Jordanian and flies large passenger planes. She climbs the highest mountains in the world, dives with sharks or goes skydiving. Alia particularly enjoys travelling in her Jordanian homeland.

programme.title: Women Above the Clouds
programme.desc: Nepal is one of the poorest countries in the world. Young women are often disadvantaged here and quite a few are married off before the age of 18. Helicopter pilot Priya Adhikari lives and works here. The 38-year-old is an exception and the only woman in Nepal who ventures into the extremely dangerous heights of the Himalayas in her helicopter.

programme.title: Wild River Rhine
programme.desc: Alluvial forests, roaring waterfalls, steep canyons and sunny slopes flank the river Rhine. The variety of habitats is the reason for the large biodiversity along the stream.There is hardly any other river in Germany that is surrounded by as many myths and legends as the river Rhine. No other river has been the topic of songs, has been painted and travelled equally frequently. Despite this it still seems to be true today what the French poet Victor Hugo once said about this river – the Rhine is a river everybody talks about, nobody explores, everybody visits but no one really knows. The film follows the water against the stream. It starts at the river's delta in the Netherlands, flows through six countries and ends in the Swiss Alps.

programme.title: Wild Poland
programme.desc: Where in Europe are bisons still to be found in the wild? And where do probably more migratory birds breed than in any other European country? The flora and fauna of Poland are full of surprises: the South is dominated by the 2000m peaks of the Tatra, to the North-East the Biebrza river forms one of the largest swamp regions of Europe, a paradise for rare birds like the ruff. Masuria is the breeding-ground for thousands of white storks, more than anywhere else on Earth. The much shier and rarer black stork also finds refuge in the large expanses of forest that stretch to the Baltic Sea. In winter, an icy wind sweeps Eastern Poland and only those with a thick skin survive in the region bordering Belorus. The cold doesn't bother the bison. Thick coats protect these ancient cattle against the snow and icy wind, but lack of food in winter does present a problem. The bison here are among the last of their kind. Once upon a time, huge herds roamed most of the European continent, today the only bison in Central Europe living in the wild are located in Eastern Poland. Poland's hard winters are no problem for otter and beaver, whose extremely dense coats protect them against the cold and enable them to swim and dive in the icy water. Although both animals are water-dwellers, they're not rivals: beavers are vegetarians and in winter eat stores of leaves and bark. Otters are active hunters all year round and live on fish and crabs. As soon as spring arrives in Poland, the river Biebrza becomes a hive of activity: thousands of birds vie with each other to be heard as they use the vast area of swampland to rest and breed. White-winged black terns and black-necked grebes build their nests, then the mating season begins for the ruffs, with the males strutting their stuff for potential mates.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League

Aivars Smaukstellis, the reigning world champion is defending his title, and two-time world champion Dainis Zageris is also here, but with a though competition, who will win?

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: The girls are all gathered at the café. Strawberry is experimenting making applesauce from scratch with a mallet (and making a mess) while the rest busily make their own wrapping paper and bows for the annual gift exchange they hold in celebration of First Frost. Mr. Longface stops by and Strawberry offers him some fresh applesauce but he declines, as he doesn't care for it. He's only there for some tea and, being that he's new in town, doesn't know what the group is up to.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Raspberry is distraught when she suspects her friends have copied her design on her lantern for the "Glimmerberry Gathering".

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: While sipping cider in Strawberry's café, the girls muse about how they cannot wait for winter to arrive. They list the various traditions they love about the season but the one they all agree on is the Glimmerberry Ball. Strawberry mentions that she doesn't think the café can hold the party this year because of how the town has grown. The girls decide to split up and search for a new location.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry opens her front door to a throng of Berrykins all cheering for the new BerryFest Princess. She is appreciative of their admiration but unsure of exactly what her duties entail. In response the Berrykins bombard her with her duties - major to miniscule. One Berrykin sums it up by telling her she's responsible for presiding over all the activities of the BerryFest to make it the best.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: While rehearsing a song alone in her cafe, Strawberry is interrupted by the arrival of Jadeybug. The poor ladybug is stressed out because her twin cousins, Kadiebug and Sadiebug, left her a message that they are coming to visit for a whole week. Jadey is unable to host them because she's having her guest room repainted.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: All of Berry Bitty City is excitedly making their way through the berry batch in search of the elusive Wanderberry. It is to be the dessert at the BerryFest Feast. Everyone is milling about searching for it on their own when Blueberry points out that the rules say the BerryFest Princess is in charge of the search. The girls turn to her for direction and she points them where she thinks the berry might be.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry opens her front door to a throng of Berrykins all cheering for the new BerryFest Princess. She is appreciative of their admiration but unsure of exactly what her duties entail. In response the Berrykins bombard her with her duties - major to miniscule. One Berrykin sums it up by telling her she's responsible for presiding over all the activities of the BerryFest to make it the best.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Lemon is ecstatic. She races out of her salon and goes around to the other girls' houses proclaiming that she "did it!" and beckoning them to join her. They follow her back and are completely dazzled by her newest creation - Glamicures. They are brightly colored, jeweled manicures with tiny microchips inside that play songs when the wearer moves her hand. Each girl lines up to receive her new glamicure and soon there is a cacophony of color and sound.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: While working in her store, Orange overhears the Berrykins laughing and shouting outside. When she goes to the door to investigate, a clump of dandelion fluff gets blown inside chased by three Berrykins. She watches as they head butt the clump around until it floats back toward Orange. Just as it floats close, she gives it a bat sending it outside and the Berrykins happily chasing after it. Wanting in on the fun, she joins them.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: With all the Baby Berrykins running around Berry Bitty City, Princess Berrykin decides to build a Day Care Center and playground. But she's worried because it's dull-looking - all grey metal and brown wood. She asks Strawberry whom might be good to help her out. And two names immediately come to her mind - Lemon and Raspberry! The Princess confesses she's always admired their sense of design and style.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: After returning to the café after a walk with her pets, Strawberry is met by Mr. Longface. He's been waiting for her so that they can get started making treats and decorating for Sadiebug's and Kadiebug's party that afternoon. But Custard and Pupcake have enjoyed their time outside so much that they want to continue playing.

programme.title: Sky's the Limit
programme.desc: When a storm causes a giant boulder to cut off Berry Bitty City's water supply, Strawberry and the girls face the possibility of having to move away from their homes. With the help of Mr. Longface Caterpillar, the girls set out on an adventure to save their town.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
